???: Ah, youth that finally follows ol': ???: Ah, youth that finally follows ol' Nana's rules?
NANA: You are a rarity! Cherish yourself: NANA: You are a rarity! Cherish yourself child.
What is your business on Evergreen Islan: What is your business on Evergreen Island? Here to catch rare Pokémon?
Sigh, that always seems to be the case f: Sigh, that always seems to be the case for you novice trainers...
They all gather here to get rare Pokémon: They all gather here to get rare Pokémon they can't find anywhere else!
Most of them never make it this far, tho: Most of them never make it this far, though. Usually the cold becomes too much.
But since you were able to make it this: But since you were able to make it this far, I'll let you in on a little secret.
Deep within Evergreen Forest, lies a sec: Deep within Evergreen Forest, lies a secret and sacred spring.
Legends say that it was once owned by a: Legends say that it was once owned by a woman who could control ice with ease.
But after the calamity, she disappeared,: But after the calamity, she disappeared, never to be seen or heard from again.
This spring is the last memento of her.
Though, I doubt a youngin like you would: Though, I doubt a youngin like you would be too interested in stuff like that, hm?
Fine, then I'll tell you something that: Fine, then I'll tell you something that may interest you even more.
The Spring itself would be useless to yo: The Spring itself would be useless to you by itself, but \c[6]extremely rare Pokémon dwell there.
Usually you'll find their young ones out: Usually you'll find their young ones out in the open, however...
They say that their leader,\\c[6] The Em: They say that their leader,\c[6] The Emperor, reveals itself to extremely powerful trainers.
NANA: Ah... I see that twinkle in your e: NANA: Ah... I see that twinkle in your eye! That must mean you're intrigued?
In that case... Please take this.
The door to the spring will not open to: The door to the spring will not open to anyone. Only those who are connected to the original owner.
This item I gave you will allow you to e: This item I gave you will allow you to enter the Spring at any time.
If you happen to capture The Emperor, I: If you happen to capture The Emperor, I may give you something nice.
But, if the Emperor does not appear to y: But, if the Emperor does not appear to you, do not fret. Become stronger and come back later.
I'm sure it will reveal itself to you on: I'm sure it will reveal itself to you once you've returned with\c[6] proof of your strength.
NANA: Oh! Oh! So you've captured the Emp: NANA: Oh! Oh! So you've captured the Emperor!
My... My... I didn't think you would be: My... My... I didn't think you would be this impressive...
Well, like I promised, here's something: Well, like I promised, here's something nice for doing something so amazing.
NANA: These washed up on the shore many: NANA: These washed up on the shore many decades ago.
I never found a use for them. Perhaps yo: I never found a use for them. Perhaps you will?
NANA: Ah, something else washed up. You: NANA: Ah, something else washed up. You can have it, I'm too old to use it.
NANA: Perhaps I shall return home soon. My real home.
Hm? You thought this is where I really l: Hm? You thought this is where I really lived?
No, no, this is more like a getaway cabi: No, no, this is more like a getaway cabin for me.
My actual home is in Neverwinter. Maybe: My actual home is in Neverwinter. Maybe we shall meet there one day?
